hf_reference.endianness_note: The occupation list is indexed as n_p for spin orbital/qubit p. Qiskit count strings are printed as c[n-1]...c[0] when q[i] is measured into c[i].
hf_reference.orbital_to_qubit_order: spin orbital p maps to qubit p

indexing.endianness_note: The occupation list is indexed as n_p for spin orbital/qubit p. Qiskit count strings are printed as c[n-1]...c[0] when q[i] is measured into c[i].
indexing.orbital_to_qubit_order: spin orbital p maps to qubit p
indexing.pauli_word_convention: Pauli words are lists of {qubit, pauli}; an empty list and pauli_word_string='I' denote the identity.

openfermion.trust_note: This notebook bridge trusts OpenFermion's Jordan-Wigner transform and does not validate Pauli terms against qforte.
